name: GangWars
short: A street gang management and PvP combat game inspired by the classic PimpWars BBS game.
description: Gang Wars is a persistent multiplayer strategy game played entirely within Discord. Players build criminal empires by hustling for cash, recruiting gang members, upgrading weapons and armor, robbing banks, and waging war against rival gangs for turf and treasure. Features turn-based economy, exponential upgrade costs, PvP combat with calculated outcomes, leaderboards, and seasonal resets.
install_msg: Gang Wars installed! Use `[p]gangwars setup` in your desired channel to begin a new season, then have players join with `[p]gangwars join <gang name>`.
author: VantageOverlook
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-member data including gang name, cash balance, health, gang member count, upgrade levels, turn counts, win/loss records, and timestamps. All data is stored per guild. Data can be deleted on request by a server administrator using `[p]gangwars reset` or `[p]gangwars wipe @user`.
